sections.paragraph:
Original: הגה

Transliteration: hâgâh

Phonetic: daw-gaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to moan, growl, utter, muse, mutter, meditate, devise, plot, speak
    1. (Qal)
      1. to roar, growl, groan
      2. to utter, speak
      3. to meditate, devise, muse, imagine
    2. (Poal) to utter
    3. (Hiphil) to mutter

Origin: a primitive root [compare H1901]

TWOT entry: 467

Part(s) of speech: Verb
